Class JavaSourceElement

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.JavaSourceElement
All Implemented Interfaces:
SourceElement, EqualsModProperty<SourceElement>, SyntaxElement
Direct Known Subclasses:
Comment, JavaProgramElement
public abstract class JavaSourceElement extends Object implements SourceElement
Top level implementation of a Java SourceElement. taken from COMPOST and changed to achieve an immutable structure

    this violates immutability, but the method is only called right after the object is created...

  • Constructor Details

    • JavaSourceElement

      protected JavaSourceElement()
      Java source element.

    • JavaSourceElement

      protected JavaSourceElement(PositionInfo pi)
      Java source element.
      Parameters:
      pi - PositionInfo the PositionInfo of the element

    • JavaSourceElement

      protected JavaSourceElement(ExtList children)
      Java source element.
      Parameters:
      children - a list of the children of this element. May contain: PositionInfo

    • JavaSourceElement

      protected JavaSourceElement(ExtList children, PositionInfo pos)

  • Method Details

    • getFirstElement

      public SourceElement getFirstElement()
      Finds the source element that occurs first in the source. The default implementation returns this element, which is correct for all terminal program elements, and many non terminals such as statements and prefixed operators.
      Specified by:
      getFirstElement in interface SourceElement
      Returns:
      the first source element in the syntactical representation of this element, may be equals to this element.
      See Also:
      • toSource()
      • getStartPosition()

    • getFirstElementIncludingBlocks

      public SourceElement getFirstElementIncludingBlocks()
      Description copied from interface: SourceElement
      Finds the source element that occurs first in the source.
      Specified by:
      getFirstElementIncludingBlocks in interface SourceElement
      Returns:
      the first source element in the syntactical representation of this element, may be equals to this element.
      See Also:
      • SourceElement.getStartPosition()

    • getLastElement

      public SourceElement getLastElement()
      Finds the source element that occurs last in the source. The default implementation returns this element, which is correct for all terminal program elements, and many non terminals such as statements and prefixed operators.
      Specified by:
      getLastElement in interface SourceElement
      Returns:
      the last source element in the syntactical representation of this element, may be equals to this element.
      See Also:
      • toSource()
      • getEndPosition()

    • toSource

      public String toSource()
      Creates a syntactical representation of the source element using the pretty printer.

    • getStartPosition

      public Position getStartPosition()
      Returns the start position of the primary token of this element. To get the start position of the syntactical first token, call the corresponding method of getFirstElement().
      Specified by:
      getStartPosition in interface SourceElement
      Returns:
      the start position of the primary token.

    • getEndPosition

      public Position getEndPosition()
      Returns the end position of the primary token of this element. To get the end position of the syntactical first token, call the corresponding method of getLastElement().
      Specified by:
      getEndPosition in interface SourceElement
      Returns:
      the end position of the primary token.

    • getRelativePosition

      public SourceElement.Position getRelativePosition()
      Returns the relative position (number of blank heading lines and columns) of the primary token of this element. To get the relative position of the syntactical first token, call the corresponding method of getFirstElement().
      Specified by:
      getRelativePosition in interface SourceElement
      Returns:
      the relative position of the primary token.

    • getPositionInfo

      public PositionInfo getPositionInfo()
      Description copied from interface: SourceElement
      complete position information
      Specified by:
      getPositionInfo in interface SourceElement

      public String toString()
      toString
      Overrides:

    • setParentClass

      protected void setParentClass(URI s)
      this violates immutability, but the method is only called right after the object is created...
      Parameters:
      s - the path of the parent class as String

    • getParentClass

      public URI getParentClass()
      get the class the statement originates from
